title: Aetherial Airships
description:
Standalone version of the modpack used in my Aetherial Airships stream world.

Aetherial Airships is a sandbox survival/exploration modpack for Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1, with Floating Islands, Airships, Create, Flying Pirates, and even the Aether!
body:
**Aetherial Airships is a sandbox survival/exploration modpack for Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1, featuring all of the following, (with more to come):**

**Worldgen/Visual:**

* Custom floating island Overworld generation, including ocean islands, mountains with rivers and lakes, cave biomes underneath the islands, and all 1.20.1 biomes and structures.
* Custom Nether generation, with floating islands over a giant Lava Sea
* _Distant Horizons_, so you can see in the distance without maxing out your CPU
* _Super Fancy Clouds_ to match the world generation
* _Clear Void_, so the sky remains blue until you're close to the bottom of the world and quickly fades to black after Y:-32
* _End Remastered_ - Adds 16 Custom Eyes of Ender, at least 12 different Custom Eyes are required to open an End Portal
* _Ecologics_ - Adds thin ice to cold biomes, new overworld trees, new food types, and some new mobs.
* _Create: Structures Arise_ and _Create: Structures Overhaul_ - Adds new _Create_-themed structures
* _The Aether_ - Adds a whole new dimension, complete with new mobs and challenging dungeons!

**Automate with _Create_, build Trains and Ships, or just explore with Airships:**

* Working Ships and Airships, using _Valkyrien Skies 2_, _Eureka! Ships!_ and a few VS2 addons.
* _Valkyrien Pirates_ - Watch out for Pirate Ships and Pirate Airships!
* _VS Crumbles_ - don't let your (air)ships take too much damage, as separated parts will fall off, and your (air)ship could completely disassemble if not enough parts remain near the Helm!
* _VS Grapples_ - so you can grapple onto (air)ships to board them, or save yourself if you fall off!
* _Create Fabric_, with popular add-ons _Create: Enchantment Industry_ and _Create: Steam 'n' Rails_.
* Bottle your Ship to move it to another location, place it in the world, or just keep it from being moved when you're offline
* _Copper Age Backport_ - adds Copper Golems, Copper armour and tools, as well as all the new Copper and Tuff blocks from the Copper Age drop!

**New food and drink types to farm and cook with, if that's your jam (or jem!):**

* _BetterEndDelight_
* _Chef's Delight_ - adds new Villager professions (the Cook and the Chef), with new village structures for them to work at.
* _Compat Delight_ - adds oranges, grapes, and blueberries, and a bunch of new recipes
* _Farmer's Delight (refabricated)_ 
* _Farmer's Delight Expansion_
* _Farmer's Cutting: BetterEnd_
* _Farmer's Cutting: The Aether_
* _Pineaple Delight_

**Quality of Life:**

* _Jade_, so you can figure out which mod a block comes from and what to harvest it with.
* _Jade VS_, so Jade functionality works with VS Ships
* _Universal Graves_, because you should have a chance to retrieve your items, even when dying to the Void
* _Your Reputation_, so you can see what Villagers and Iron Golems think of you
* A custom _Patchouli_ Guide Book to get you started

If you want to see some of the development progress so far, check out my [Aetherial Airships Season 2 playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLEs1oQn8_s0F_jRiuA2II96q0ocxoNB-0) on YouTube!
